signals.npcLine: Market pulse weak, shadow traders whisper fear in the neon haze.
signals.questPulse: Crypto tides shift; trust fractures in the digital sprawl.
signals.worldFeed: Global caps flicker slight gains amid growing unrest.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented exchanges buzz under low trust protocols.

signals.npcLine: New tokens flicker on the grid; some spike, others ghost.
signals.questPulse: Scan the ether for rising signals: PENGU and CHIP show sparks.
signals.worldFeed: Unstable coin lifecycles detected; volatility bites sharper.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual spikes in obscure tokens draw hacker eyes.

signals.npcLine: Fear shadows market minds; gather intel before the next crash.
signals.questPulse: Silence in the chatter hides the real price twists.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment data flags rising panic; survival depends on foresight.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter mentions upcoming market turbulence.

signals.npcLine: Trader eyes twitch; hopes cling to obsolete hype cycles.
signals.questPulse: Outlandish tokens like KAT ripple through darknet whispers.
signals.worldFeed: Low-score tokens spawn speculative frictions in empty channels.
signals.clueEvent: Digital drifters chase fleeting token rumors in neon alleys.

signals.npcLine: Cracks appear where optimism once burned brightest.
signals.questPulse: Sentiment surveys flicker toward fear; decode hidden signals fast.
signals.worldFeed: Subtle market cap upticks mask deeper systemic doubts.
signals.clueEvent: Silent transactions spike under cover of night trades.
